description_long: This shotgun features a robust, futuristic design with a predominantly gray and maroon color scheme accented by a gold wing emblem on both sides. The body is boxy and angular, with a thick, reinforced barrel and a prominent muzzle. The grip and trigger area are ergonomically shaped, with a maroon handle and a squared trigger guard. The magazine is straight and extends downward, suggesting a high-capacity, semi-automatic mechanism. The surface shows some wear and tear, giving it a battle-worn appearance, and the overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components. The shotgun's compact size and stylized details suggest it is designed for close-quarters urban combat.
description: A compact, futuristic shotgun with a gray and maroon body, gold wing emblems, and a boxy, reinforced barrel. It features an ergonomic grip, squared trigger guard, and a straight magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick, reinforced barrel and the squared muzzle opening, with the top rail and sight visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the gold wing emblem, maroon and gray color scheme, ergonomic grip, and straight magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the receiver, the magazine base, and the alignment of the barrel and body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the gold wing emblem, maroon and gray panels, and visible trigger guard.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, thick and reinforced with a prominent muzzle opening and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Squared, medium-sized trigger guard with a robust, angular profile and no finger grooves
